# -------------------------------------------------------------------

numpy

matplotlib

# GUI (required for gui/fenge.py and gui/train.py)
# -------------------------------------------------------------------

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Widely used by multiple model families
# -------------------------------------------------------------------
einops
timm>=0.6.0
opencv-python

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Model-specific dependencies (install per use)
# -------------------------------------------------------------------

# U-Net (SMP-based architectures in models/cnn/unet/)
segmentation-models-pytorch

# SAM-family models (medsam, sam_med2d, sam2_unet, medical_sam_adapter)
segment-anything

# SAM-Med2D data augmentation
albumentations

# MedSAM — NIfTI format support
nibabel

# SAM2-UNet — Hydra/OmegaConf config system
hydra-core
omegaconf

# HiFormer — NIfTI export
SimpleITK

# UniverSeg — data validation
pydantic

# viewpoint_aware_net — YAML config parsing
pyyaml

# TransUNet — config data structure
ml_collections

tensorboard
